svg.title: Data capture flow: onboarding, during exam, post exam, and admin inputs
svg.desc: Three-phase data capture flowchart showing what is collected at each stage and which data is admin-configured vs student-provided
svg.text: Phase 3 — post exam (calculated by platform, no AI)
Super admin config — updated annually by keySkillset
Purple = student types it once. Teal = platform records silently. Amber = formula, no AI needed.
Coral = admin updates once a year after NTA publishes official data.
Nothing in amber touches a model. Every calculation is a deterministic formula you can audit.
